svg.text: eth2 — Custom (Gateway between Kali attacker and Windows)

g.text: IPS + IDS both running on same adapter
Wazuh (Docker on Kali) — Manager • Indexer • Dashboard
receives Snort alerts + Windows agent logs → analysis + monitoring UI
T-Pot Honeypot VM — fake target on eth2 • traps attacker • Wazuh agent reports
